codeReview.summary: The manufacturing/inventory review doc satisfies VAL-MFG-001, VAL-MFG-002, and VAL-MFG-003. It narrates the dual product/catalog surfaces, raw-material intake and purchasing boundary, opening stock and adjustments, batch traceability, production and packing flows, finished-goods reservation/dispatch/COGS, valuation/reporting, and the explicit production dependency on inventory GL automation remaining disabled.

summary: PASS. The manufacturing/inventory review artifact is thorough, consistent with the cited controllers/services/tests, and covers the required invariants, concurrency/costing risks, product-to-inventory linkage analysis, and operational accounting boundary without scrutiny-level defects.
